top_signals.title: These underperforming trades could yield big returns over next six months
top_signals.summary: ETF Action's Mike Akins is encouraging investors to boost exposure to groups that underperformed compared with major artificial intelligence stocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: 'Ghostcommit' hides prompt injection in images to fool AI agents, steal secrets
top_signals.summary: A PNG hiding a prompt injection could steal your repo's secrets, researchers demonstrate. The technique, dubbed 'Ghostcommit,' slipped past AI code reviewers CodeRabbit and Bugbot, which never open image files at all, then convinced a coding agent to read a repo's .env and write every secret into the code as a list of numbers. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
